rope.formula: out_even = (even * cos - odd * sin) >>> fractional_bits; out_odd = (even * sin + odd * cos) >>> fractional_bits

target_fixture_distinction.distinction: selected non-GEMM op is input_layernorm; report includes target semantic metadata plus bounded 4-element RMSNorm/RoPE source-path fixture evidence
